description: During a project, a client asks a technician to perform a task that is outside the original scope of work.

nodes.task_description: The technician politely informs the client that the request is out of scope and that they should speak to the project manager.

expected_outcome.value: The technician correctly avoids performing out-of-scope work and directs the client to the proper channel.

nodes.task_description: The project manager contacts the client to discuss the new request.

expected_outcome.value: The PM and client discuss the new requirement.

nodes.task_description: The project manager creates a formal change order for the additional work, which the client approves.

expected_outcome.value: The scope creep is managed formally through a change order, ensuring the work is properly billed.
